name: Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Graham flour or whole wheat flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift white flour, salt, and baking powder together.
2. Add graham or whole wheat flour to the sifted ingredients.
3. In a separate bowl, combine sugar, water, molasses, and milk.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until well combined.
5. Stir in chopped nuts and raisins.
6. Pour the batter into well-oiled baking pans.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 1 hour.
8. Yield: 2 small loaves.
